query:
-- Real addresses (not "Unknown Location")
SELECT COUNT(*) AS real_address_count
FROM services
WHERE (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '')
  AND locationAddress IS NOT NULL AND locationAddress != ''
  AND locationAddress NOT LIKE '%Unknown%';

-- Phone number cross-match: unmatched service phone matches phone on a matched service
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT u.externalId) AS phone_crossmatch_count
FROM services u
JOIN services m ON REPLACE(REPLACE(m.phoneNumber,' ',''),'(','') = REPLACE(REPLACE(u.phoneNumber,' ',''),'(','')
  AND (m.customerExternalId IS NOT NULL AND m.customerExternalId != '')
WHERE (u.customerExternalId IS NULL OR u.customerExternalId = '')
  AND u.phoneNumber IS NOT NULL AND u.phoneNumber != ''
  AND u.phoneNumber NOT LIKE '%Unknown%';
